title: GMS Week 21 - COLLAPSE!
summary:
Main
The ongoing sub-continent collapse in prices fully materialized this week, with all sectors talking down the market and refusing to offer anewon any fresh tonnage whilst they wait for markets to stabilize. As the Ukraine conflict endures, fundamentals continue their collapse at all of the major recycling destinations, as plate prices take turns to precipitously plummet (in India this week) and a combination of the two have likewise afflicted Bangladesh. A global currency meltdown at the major recycling destinations has also been unfolding, with records being shattered at their new lows against the U.S.
